headline: Why Starbucks (SBUX) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of coffeehouse chain Starbucks (NASDAQ:SBUX) jumped 1.9% in the afternoon session after Iran announced the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, which triggered a sharp drop in crude oil prices and signaled an easing of inflationary pressures on operating margins.

headline: What Starbucks (SBUX)'s Dividend Hike And MUSH Foods Deal Mean For Shareholders
summary: Starbucks Corporation recently declared a quarterly cash dividend of US$0.62 per share, payable on May 29, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026, while MUSH Foods announced its products are now available at most Starbucks locations as part of a major retail expansion. Together with improving comparable sales and new menu innovations, these moves highlight Starbucks’ efforts to refresh its customer offering and reinforce its position in everyday on-the-go eating occasions.
